messages.text:
Hi. I’m sorry you’re having those thoughts. Honestly, our meeting went very well for me. I felt comfortable, calm, and pleasant with you. I left feeling like everything went well and that this could be the start of something good))
But I really don’t understand why you expected any intimacy on the very first day. We were seeing each other for the first time. I was a little shy, but that’s natural. I’m well mannered, and for me, such things happen gradually and organically. I was just thinking that if everything went so smoothly and pleasantly, we could develop the relationship further, and by the second meeting, everything would be much more natural☺️☺️

I liked you. And if I asked you for help, it was only because I trusted you and believed I could rely on a man I felt comfortable with. I wouldn’t have turned to someone I didn’t feel anything for)
And I’m sincerely sorry that instead of enjoying a good first meeting, we’re now discussing our doubts…
